prompt: Some people say it is important to set clear goals when starting new activities. Do you think this is a good idea?
instruction: TOPICについて、あなたの意見とその理由を2つ書きなさい。
referenceAnswer: I think this is a good idea. First, setting clear goals when starting new activities helps people use their time efficiently. When they know what they want to achieve, they can plan what to do and avoid wasting time. Second, clear goals make people stay motivated. This means they can keep working hard even when unexpected difficulties arise, because they know exactly what they are working toward. Therefore, I think it is a good idea to set clear goals when starting new activities.

prompt: Some people provide free online video content to help students study by themselves at home. Do you think this is a good idea?
instruction: TOPICについて、あなたの意見とその理由を2つ書きなさい。
referenceAnswer: I think this is a good idea. First, it is efficient for students to study with it. They can watch unclear parts again and again and skip sections they already understand. Second, it can provide more opportunities for students who want to study many subjects and spend many hours learning. Since it is free, they can study as much as they want without financial worries. Therefore, I think it is a good idea for people to provide free online video content to help students study by themselves at home.

prompt: Today, some schools are teaching their students how to start their own companies. Do you think this is a good idea?
instruction: TOPICについて、あなたの意見とその理由を2つ書きなさい。
referenceAnswer: I think this is a good idea. First, teaching students how to start their own companies is helpful for their future careers. They can learn how businesses operate, from product creation to financial management. Second, this idea helps students become more creative. In class, they think about questions without clear answers, such as what to sell, what types of customers to focus on, and ways to make a profit. Therefore, I think it is a good idea for schools to teach their students how to start their own companies.

prompt: Do you think it is a good idea for people to take notes on their smartphones?
instruction: QUESTIONについて、あなたの意見とその理由を2つ英語で書きなさい。
referenceAnswer: Yes, I think taking notes on smartphones is a good idea. I have two reasons. First, it makes information easy to use. People can quickly edit, search, and review their notes. Second, taking notes on smartphones can reduce paper use. Notebooks do not need to be used, so the amount of paper used in daily life is decreased.

prompt: Do you think it is good for students to share their opinions about books with their friends?
instruction: QUESTIONについて、あなたの意見とその理由を2つ英語で書きなさい。
referenceAnswer: Yes, I do. First, students can learn how to put their thoughts into words. By putting their thoughts into words, they can understand their own opinions better. Second, students who listen to others can also learn new ideas. These students can learn to understand a different way of thinking, even though they read the same book.

prompt: Do you think robots that can do housework are good for families?
instruction: QUESTIONについて、あなたの意見とその理由を2つ英語で書きなさい。
referenceAnswer: Yes, I think so. First, robots that can do housework save time for families. Families can focus on talking, playing, and eating together instead of doing housework. Second, some robots can carry or lift heavy things. This is especially helpful for older people or parents with small children, since they may have difficulty doing such tasks.
